claim: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) Targeted support for general schools (curriculum standards, TEIP-style funding, reduced grade retention) is the only scenario that improves conditions for the majority of pupils without disrupting existing choice, structure, or maintainer arrangements — but it delivers real gains only if the funding is made durable and ring-fenced, since the scenario's own cost analysis flags it as vulnerable to fiscal-consolidation cuts.
interest: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the concern(s) raised by pedagogus_erdekvedo, kisgyerekes_szuloi, konzervativ_ertekvedo, digitalisgazdasagi, egyhazi_fenntartoi, kormanyzati_reformrealizmus, fuggetlen_szakpolitikai_kutatomuhely, pedagogus_szakszervezeti_hang
value: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) a trade-off between the scenario's stated goal and the concern raised
fear: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the benefit claimed will not materialise as described
assumption: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the claim's premise holds under implementation as designed
empirical_uncertainty: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) not independently graded here — see the evidence layer
